title: acalypha brachystachya
intro: Acalypha brachystachya, also known as the Small Stork's Bill or Dwarf Copperleaf, is a plant species in the family Euphorbiaceae. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, which can help to soothe skin irritations and infections. The health benefits of Acalypha brachystachya include reducing fever, relieving respiratory issues, and supporting the immune system. Herbal preparations of this plant can be made into teas, infusions, or topical creams, and are commonly used to treat skin conditions such as eczema and acne.
